docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER CAIMOL-CRUZ, CORAZON HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS. TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-26-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-12-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CORAZON CAIMOL-CRUZ' NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO 10/26/10 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 301, PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
RESPONSE TO RESP.'S OPPOS. TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS FILED BY PETITIONER CAIMOL-CRUZ, CORAZON

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED PETITIONER CORAZON CAIMOL-CRUZ'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHERINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: RHONDA FUNG CSR # 4819 (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
George Engler, Esq., 415-859-9925 for petitioner and moving party Corazon Caimol-Cruz
Nancy Tavernit, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3961 for defendant and opposing party Retirement Board of City and County of San Francisco

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court DENIED PETITIONER CORAZON CAIMOL-CRUZ'S Notice Of Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHERINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR # 4819 (301/PJB)
